playbook.intent: Cluttered Figma inbox -> inbox-zero + resolved threads + logged unresolved decisions.
playbook.scope: Designer runs a 30-minute daily comment triage on Figma. Includes review of open threads, resolutions, escalations, decision-log entries, and a snapshot in version history. Done when the inbox is empty and decisions log is current.

success-criteria.criterion: Figma inbox at zero by end of session
Any unresolved decision logged with owner + due date
Snapshot in version history with the date

stage.name: Scan
stage.intent: See every open thread in one pass.

tasks.task: Mark stale threads (>2 days) for triage

stage.decision-gate: Advance when all threads are visible in one screen.

stage.name: Resolve + reply

tasks.task: Resolve actionable comments with a reply

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when easy threads are closed.

stage.name: Escalate blockers
stage.intent: Push what needs a decision today.

tasks.task: DM stakeholders for decisions older than 24h
Surface design-system impacts to system owner
Set a 24h deadline on each escalation

stage.decision-gate: Advance once each blocker has an owner + deadline.

stage.name: Log unresolved
stage.intent: Decisions must survive the next standup.

tasks.task: Add unresolved decisions to the design decision log

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every unresolved item is logged.

stage.name: Snapshot

tasks.task: Create a named version snapshot in Figma
Note the snapshot in the decision log

stage.decision-gate: Done when snapshot exists for the date.

extra.value: [Skipping the snapshot -> impossible to roll back a bad change, Treating comments as 'someday' -> threads pile up forever, No decision log entry -> same question keeps coming back]
['Is the comment inbox actually empty?', 'Are open questions in a single log, not scattered?', 'Does the snapshot exist with today''s date?']

{human: faion get-content daily-figma-sync-comment-triage-30min --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-figma-sync-comment-triage-30min --format context, json: faion get-content daily-figma-sync-comment-triage-30min --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
